7077.meaning_1: not a being; not a living being

20388.meaning_1: fit to participate in a legal action
20388.example_1: anāpatti adhammena vā vaggena vā na kamm'ārahassa vā kammaṃ katan'ti jānanto ukkoṭeti, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.
20388.commentary: (VVt) tathā kamm'ārahassa cā'ti yassa saṅgho kammaṃ karoti, so n'eva kammapatto, n'āpi chand'āraho, apica kamm'āraho'ti

28599.meaning_1: danger to the life (of); fatal accident (for)
28599.example_1: dujjānaṃ kho pan'etaṃ, bhante, bhagavato vā jīvit'antarāyānaṃ, mayhaṃ vā jīvit'antarāyānaṃ. desetu me, bhante bhagavā, dhammaṃ, desetu, sugato, dhammaṃ, yaṃ mam'assa dīgharattaṃ hitāya sukhāyā'ti.
28599.example_2: ayaṃ kakkhaḷo pharuso jīvitantarāyaṃ vā brahmacariyantarāyaṃ vā karissatī'ti n'āroceti, aññe patirūpe bhikkhū apassanto n'āroceti, nachādetukāmo n'āroceti, paññāyissati sakena kammenā'ti n'āroceti, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.

48918.example_1: ayaṃ kakkhaḷo pharuso jīvitantarāyaṃ vā brahmacariyantarāyaṃ vā karissatī'ti n'āroceti, aññe patirūpe bhikkhū apassanto n'āroceti, nachādetukāmo n'āroceti, paññāyissati sakena kammenā'ti n'āroceti, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.

35489.meaning_1: not wishing to conceal; not wanting to hide
35489.example_1: ayaṃ kakkhaḷo pharuso jīvitantarāyaṃ vā brahmacariyantarāyaṃ vā karissatī'ti n'āroceti, aññe patirūpe bhikkhū apassanto n'āroceti, nachādetukāmo n'āroceti, paññāyissati sakena kammenā'ti n'āroceti, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.

17326.meaning_1: perceiving (someone) as less than twenty years old
17326.example_1: ūnavīsativasse paripuṇṇavīsativassasaññī upasampādeti, anāpatti. paripuṇṇavīsativasse ūnavīsativassasaññī, āpatti dukkaṭassa. paripuṇṇavīsativasse vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa.

43691.meaning_1: perceiving (someone) as fully twenty years old
43691.example_1: paripuṇṇavīsativasse vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. paripuṇṇavīsativasse paripuṇṇavīsativassasaññī, anāpatti.
43691.commentary: (VINa) anāpatti ūnavīsativassaṃ paripuṇṇavīsativassasaññī'ti ettha kiñ'c'āpi upasampādentassa anāpatti, puggalo pana anupasampanno'va hoti. sace pana so dasavassaccayena aññaṃ upasampādeti, tañ'ce muñcitvā gaṇo pūrati, sūpasampanno. so'pi ca yāva na jānāti, tāv'assa n'eva sagg'antarāyo na mokkh'antarāyo, ñatvā pana puna upasampajjitabbaṃ.

43690.commentary: (VINa) paripuṇṇavīsativasso'ti paṭisandhiggahaṇato paṭṭhāya paripuṇṇavīsativasso, gabbhavīso'pi hi paripuṇṇavīsativassotv'eva saṅkhye gacchati.

31607.meaning_1: perceiving (something) as a party of thieves
31607.example_1: theyyasatthe theyyasatthasaññī saṃvidhāya ekaddhānamaggaṃ paṭipajjati, antamaso gāmantarampi, āpatti pācittiyassa.

2824.meaning_1: perceiving (something) as not a party of thieves
2824.example_1: atheyyasatthe vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. atheyyasatthe atheyyasatthasaññī anāpatti.

2823.meaning_1: not a party of thieves; not a caravan of thieves

19204.example_1: taṃ sutvā gāmikā visaṃ nāma kakkhaḷaṃ, yo naṃ khādati, so marati, kaṇṭakam'pi vijjhitvā māreti, ubho'p'ete kakkhaḷā, ko ettha ānisaṃso'ti gehadvārāni thakesuṃ, dārake ca palāpesuṃ.
19204.example_2: ayaṃ kakkhaḷo pharuso jīvitantarāyaṃ vā brahmacariyantarāyaṃ vā karissatī'ti n'āroceti, aññe patirūpe bhikkhū apassanto n'āroceti, nachādetukāmo n'āroceti, paññāyissati sakena kammenā'ti n'āroceti, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.

47986.example_1: dirattatirattaṃ ce bhikkhu senāya vasamāno uyyodhikaṃ vā bal'aggaṃ vā senābyūhaṃ vā anīkadassanaṃ vā gaccheyya, pācittiyaṃ.
47986.example_2: seyyath'idaṃ… hatthiyuddhaṃ assayuddhaṃ mahiṃsayuddhaṃ usabhayuddhaṃ ajayuddhaṃ meṇḍayuddhaṃ kukkuṭayuddhaṃ vaṭṭakayuddhaṃ daṇḍayuddhaṃ muṭṭhiyuddhaṃ nibbuddhaṃ uyyodhikaṃ bal'aggaṃ senābyūhaṃ anīkadassanaṃ iti vā iti evarūpā visūkadassanā paṭivirato samaṇo gotamo'ti
47986.commentary: (VIN) bal'aggaṃ nāma ettakā hatthī, ettakā assā, ettakā rathā, ettakā pattī. (VINa) balassa aggaṃ jānanti etthā'ti bal'aggaṃ, balagaṇanaṭṭhānan'ti attho. (DNa) balaggan'ti balagaṇanaṭṭhānaṃ.

45756.grammar: ind, prep, acc sg of pāra
45756.example_1: anāpatti na has'ādhippāyo, sati karaṇīye udakaṃ otaritvā nimujjati vā ummujjati vā palavati vā, pāraṃ gacchanto nimujjati vā ummujjati vā palavati vā, āpadāsu, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.

6115.meaning_1: (of a rule) not formulated; not prescribed; not decreed; not declared
6115.meaning_2: (of a rule) not formulated; not prescribed; not decreed; not declared
6115.example_1: yāvakīvañ'ca bhikkhave bhikkhū apaññattaṃ na paññāpessanti, paññattaṃ na samucchindissanti, yathāpaññattesu sikkhāpadesu samādāya vattissanti
6115.example_2: apaññattena vuccamāno, idaṃ na sallekhāya na dhutatthāya na pāsādikatāya na apacayāya na vīriy'ārambhāya saṃvattatī'ti anādariyaṃ karoti, āpatti dukkaṭassa.
6115.commentary: (ANa) aṭṭh'aṅgiko maggo'ti idaṃ paññattaṃ nāma, tayo satipaṭṭhānā… navaṅgiko maggo'ti idaṃ apaññattaṃ nāma. vinayapariyāyena cattāro pārājikā… tiṃsanissaggiyā pācittiyāti idaṃ paññattaṃ nāma, tayo pārājikā… ekatiṃsa nissaggiyā pācittiyāti idaṃ apaññattaṃ nāma.

14095.example_1: ukkhittake ukkhittakasaññī sambhuñjati vā saṃvasati vā saha vā seyyaṃ kappeti, āpatti pācittiyassa.

4370.example_1: anukkhittake vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. anukkhittake anukkhittakasaññī, anāpatti.

4369.construction:
na > an + √khip + ta + ka
na + ukkhittaka

36568.example_1: nāsitake nāsitakasaññī upalāpeti vā upaṭṭhāpeti vā sambhuñjati vā saha vā seyyaṃ kappeti, āpatti pācittiyassa.

4060.example_1: anāsitake vematiko, āpatti dukkaṭassa. anāsitake anāsitakasaññī, anāpatti.

4059.meaning_1: not an expelled monk; unbanished monastic
4059.construction:
na > a + nāse + ita + ka
anāsita + ka

28328.meaning_1: must be known; should be understood
28328.example_1: āraññiken'āvuso, bhikkhunā saṅghagatena saṅghe viharantena ābhisamācāriko'pi dhammo jānitabbo.

26748.meaning_1: thinkable; should be thought about; should be speculated about
26748.example_1: cattār'imāni, bhikkhave, acinteyyāni, na cintetabbāni, yāni cintento ummādassa vighātassa bhāgī assa. katamāni cattāri?

31061.meaning_1: should be weighed; should be measured; should be compared; should be judged

69527.meaning_1: wanting to disparage; wishing to speak badly (about)
69527.example_1: anāpatti na vivaṇṇetu'kāmo, iṅgha tvaṃ suttante vā gāthāyo vā abhidhammaṃ vā pariyāpuṇassu, pacchā vinayaṃ pariyāpuṇissasī'ti bhaṇati, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.
69527.commentary: (VVt) anāpattivisayaṃ dassetum'āha navivaṇṇetu'kāmassā'tiādi. navivaṇṇetu'kāmassa handa sutt'antaṃ pariyāpuṇa, pacchā'pi vinayaṃ pariyāpuṇissasi iti evaṃ vadantassa anāpattī'ti yojanā.

7760.meaning_1: details of the Dhamma; finer points of the teaching; (comm) doctrine and 'higher' doctrine
7760.example_1: puna caparaṃ, subhūti, bhikkhu dhammakāmo hoti piyasamudāhāro abhidhamme abhivinaye uḷārapāmojjo.
7760.example_2: anāpatti na vivaṇṇetu'kāmo, iṅgha tvaṃ suttante vā gāthāyo vā abhidhammaṃ vā pariyāpuṇassu, pacchā vinayaṃ pariyāpuṇissasī'ti bhaṇati, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.
7760.commentary: (ANa) abhidhamme abhivinaye'ti ettha dhammo abhidhammo, vinayo abhivinayo'ti catukkaṃ veditabbaṃ.

11286.meaning_1: having acted; having behaved; having performed; having practised
11286.example_1: evaṃ vadeyyā'ti anācāraṃ ācaritvā, aññāṇakena āpanno'ti jānantū'ti pātimokkhe uddissamāne evaṃ vadeti, idān'eva kho ahaṃ jānāmi, ayam'pi kira dhammo sutt'āgato suttapariyāpanno anvaddhamāsaṃ uddesaṃ āgacchatī'ti, āpatti dukkaṭassa.

69753.meaning_1: being annoyed; being troubled; being vexed (by)
69753.example_1: anāpatti kenaci viheṭhīyamāno mokkh'ādhippāyo pahāraṃ deti, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.

53304.meaning_1: intending to get free; aiming at escape
53304.example_1: anāpatti kenaci viheṭhīyamāno mokkh'ādhippāyo pahāraṃ deti, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.

11329.meaning_1: failure in moral conduct; wrong behavior
11329.example_1: ācāravipattiyā vā diṭṭhivipattiyā vā anuddhaṃseti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. anupasampannaṃ anuddhaṃseti, āpatti dukkaṭassa.
11329.commentary: (VSa) tattha garukānaṃ dvinnaṃ āpattikkhandhānaṃ vasena sīlavipatticodanā veditabbā, avasesānaṃ vasena ācāravipatticodanā, micchādiṭṭhi-antaggāhika-diṭṭhivasena diṭṭhivipatticodanā, ājīvahetu paññattānaṃ channaṃ sikkhāpadānaṃ vasena ājīvavipatticodanā veditabbā.

32553.example_2: ācāravipattiyā vā diṭṭhivipattiyā vā anuddhaṃseti, āpatti dukkaṭassa. anupasampannaṃ anuddhaṃseti, āpatti dukkaṭassa.
32553.commentary: (DNa) diṭṭhivipattī'ti tattha katamā diṭṭhivipatti? n'atthi dinnaṃ n'atthi yiṭṭhan'ti evaṃ āgatā sammādiṭṭhivināsikā micchādiṭṭhi. (ANa) diṭṭhivipattī'ti micchādiṭṭhi. (VSa) garukānaṃ dvinnaṃ āpattikkhandhānaṃ vasena sīlavipatticodanā veditabbā

15640.meaning_1: wanting to cause; wishing to provoke
15640.example_1: anāpatti na kukkuccaṃ upadahitu'kāmo ūnavīsativasso maññe tvaṃ upasampanno, vikāle maññe tayā bhuttaṃ, majjaṃ maññe tayā pītaṃ, mātugāmena saddhiṃ raho maññe tayā nisinnaṃ, iṅgha jānāhi, mā te pacchā kukkuccaṃ ahosī'ti bhaṇati, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.

30503.example_1: etadeva paccayaṃ karitvā anaññan'ti na añño koci paccayo hoti upassutiṃ tiṭṭhituṃ.

18839.example_1: so āṇāpetvā vippaṭisārī sāveti, mā ghātehī'ti. so sādhū'ti oramati, ubhinnaṃ anāpatti.
18839.example_2: anāpatti, imesaṃ sutvā oramissāmi viramissāmi vūpasamissāmi attānaṃ parimocessāmī'ti gacchati, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.

70141.example_1: yadi saṅghassa pattakallaṃ, saṅgho imaṃ adhikaraṇaṃ tiṇ'avatthārakena vūpasameyya, ṭhapetvā thullavajjaṃ, ṭhapetvā gihippaṭisaṃyuttan'ti.
70141.example_2: anāpatti, imesaṃ sutvā oramissāmi viramissāmi vūpasamissāmi attānaṃ parimocessāmī'ti gacchati, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.

55213.meaning_1: suitable reason; appropriate cause; good reason

4368.example_1: yattakā bhikkhū tassa uposathakammassa pattā yuttā anurūpā, sabb'antimena paricchedena cattāro bhikkhū pakatattā, saṅghena anukkhittā, te ca kho hatthapāsaṃ avijahitvā ekasīmayaṃ ṭhitā.
4368.example_2: anāpatti anukkhitto'ti jānāti, ukkhitto osārito'ti jānāti, ukkhitto taṃ diṭṭhiṃ paṭinissaṭṭho'ti jānāti, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.

43910.meaning_1: sets free; releases; liberates; lets out (from)
43910.example_1: sā kaṇhaṃ nāma janesi. jāto kaṇho pabyāhāsi, dhovatha maṃ, amma, nahāpetha maṃ amma, imasmā maṃ asucismā parimocetha, atthāya vo bhavissāmī'ti.
43910.example_2: anāpatti, imesaṃ sutvā oramissāmi viramissāmi vūpasamissāmi attānaṃ parimocessāmī'ti gacchati, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.
43910.synonym: ussajjati, osajjati, ossajjati, pamuñcati, pamocayati, mocayati, moceti, vimoceti

23099.meaning_1: wanting to disturb; wishing to disrupt
23099.example_1: gilāno gacchati, gilānassa karaṇīyena gacchati, uccārena vā passāvena vā pīḷito gacchati, na kammaṃ kopetu'kāmo puna paccāgamissāmī'ti gacchati, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.

39450.construction: pati > paty > pacc + ā + √gam + issa + ti
39450.example_1: s'āhaṃ etādisaṃ katvā, byasanaṃ kāmahetukaṃ, na taṃ paccāgamissāmi, nibbān'ābhiratā sadā.
39450.example_2: gilāno gacchati, gilānassa karaṇīyena gacchati, uccārena vā passāvena vā pīḷito gacchati, na kammaṃ kopetu'kāmo puna paccāgamissāmī'ti gacchati, ummattakassa, ādikammikassā'ti.

20465.meaning_1: duty; obligation; business; something to be done
20465.example_1: yo pubbe karaṇīyāni, pacchā so kātum'icchati, sukhā so dhaṃsate ṭhānā, pacchā ca m'anutappati.
20465.example_2: khīṇā jāti, vusitaṃ brahmacariyaṃ, kataṃ karaṇīyaṃ, n'āparaṃ itthattāyā'ti pajānāti.

17795.example_1: lokavādapaṭisaṃyuttāya diṭṭhiyā aṭṭhahi ākārehi abhiniveso hoti. bhavadiṭṭhiyā ek'ūnavīsatiyā ākārena abhiniveso hoti. vibhavadiṭṭhiyā ekena ākārena abhiniveso hoti.

17782.example_1: ek'ūnatiṃso vayasā subhadda, yaṃ pabbajiṃ kiṃkusal'ānuesī, vassāni paññāsa samādhikāni, yato ahaṃ pabbajito subhadda.

17789.example_1: pañca ca kammuno satāni pañca ca kammāni tīṇi ca kammāni, kamme ca aḍḍhakamme ca, dvaṭṭhipaṭipadā, dvaṭṭh'antarakappā, chaḷābhijātiyo, aṭṭha purisabhūmiyo, ek'ūnapaññāsa ājīvakasate, ek'ūnapaññāsa paribbājakasate

17794.example_1: ek'ūnavīse uppanne mūlacīvare paccāsācīvaraṃ uppajjati, dasāhā kāretabbaṃ.

17797.example_1: tattha yo dvādasamāse mātukucchismiṃ vasitvā mahāpavāraṇāya jāto, so tato paṭṭhāya yāva ek'ūnavīsatime vasse mahāpavāraṇā, taṃ atikkamitvā pāṭipade upasampādetabbo. eten'upāyena hāyanavaḍḍhanaṃ veditabbaṃ.

29282.meaning_1: (vinaya) legal act of rebuke; legal act of censure
29282.meaning_2: legal act of rebuke; legal act of censure
29282.example_1: evañ'ca pana saṅgho sātisāro hoti. yo kho, bhikkhave, samaggo saṅgho amūḷhavinay'ārahassa tajjanīyakammaṃ karoti
29282.commentary: (VBt) yena kammena santajjanaṃ karīyati, taṃ tajjanīyakammaṃ nāma. yena kammena nissāya te vatthabban'ti nissiyati bhajāpiyati niyasso, taṃ niyasakammaṃ nāma.

29281.meaning_1: to be rebuked; should be censured
29281.example_1: evañ'ca pana saṅgho sātisāro hoti. yo kho, bhikkhave, samaggo saṅgho amūḷhavinay'ārahassa tajjanīyakammaṃ karoti

82230.meaning_1: (vinaya) legal action for the verdict of recalcitrance
82230.meaning_2: legal action for the verdict of recalcitrance
82230.example_1: adhammakammaṃ taṃ, upāli, avinayakammanti. yo nu kho, bhante, samaggo saṅgho amūḷhavinay'ārahassa tassapāpiyasikākammaṃ karoti

37900.example_1: hand'assa mayaṃ niyassakammaṃ paṭippassambhemā'ti. te tassa niyassakammaṃ paṭippassambhenti

37898.meaning_1: (a legal act of the Saṅgha) conferring disgrace, loss of status; (or requiring effort)
37898.meaning_2: (a legal act of the Saṅgha) conferring disgrace, loss of status; (or requiring effort)
37898.example_1: hand'assa mayaṃ niyassakammaṃ paṭippassambhemā'ti. te tassa niyassakammaṃ paṭippassambhenti

42536.example_1: kathaṃ mayaṃ, bhante, assajipunabbasukānaṃ bhikkhūnaṃ kīṭāgirismā pabbājanīyakammaṃ karoma? caṇḍā te bhikkhū pharusā'ti.
42536.commentary: (VINt) yena tato āvāsato, gāmato ca pabbājenti kuladūsakaṃ, taṃ pabbājanīyakammaṃ nāma.

14128.example_1: hand'assa mayaṃ āpattiyā adassane ukkhepanīyakammaṃ karomā'ti. te tassa āpattiyā adassane ukkhepanīyakammaṃ karonti
14128.commentary: (VBt) chaḍḍīyati sātisāro bhikkhusaṅghena, taṃ kammaṃ ukkhepanīyakammaṃ nāmā'ti veditabbaṃ. (PYt) āpattiadassan'ādīsu uddharitvā khipīyati apanīyati anena vinayakammenā'ti ukkhepanīyaṃ, tam'eva kammaṃ ukkhepanīyakammaṃ.

14127.example_1: hand'assa mayaṃ āpattiyā adassane ukkhepanīyakammaṃ karomā'ti. te tassa āpattiyā adassane ukkhepanīyakammaṃ karonti
14127.commentary: (PYt) āpattiadassan'ādīsu uddharitvā khipīyati apanīyati anena vinayakammenā'ti ukkhepanīyaṃ, tam'eva kammaṃ ukkhepanīyakammaṃ.

23585.meaning_1: ascetic who refuses further food; who does not eat after the meal
23585.example_1: aṭṭha dhut'aṅgāni, āraññik'aṅgaṃ, piṇḍapātik'aṅgaṃ, paṃsukūlik'aṅgaṃ, tecīvarik'aṅgaṃ, sapadānacārik'aṅgaṃ, khalupacchābhattik'aṅgaṃ, nesajjik'aṅgaṃ, yathāsanthatik'aṅgaṃ, idaṃ vuccati vataṃ, na sīlaṃ.

23586.meaning_1: ascetic practice of refusing further food
23586.construction:
khalu + pacchā + bhatta + ika + aṅga
khalupacchābhattika + aṅga
23586.example_1: aṭṭha dhut'aṅgāni, āraññik'aṅgaṃ, piṇḍapātik'aṅgaṃ, paṃsukūlik'aṅgaṃ, tecīvarik'aṅgaṃ, sapadānacārik'aṅgaṃ, khalupacchābhattik'aṅgaṃ, nesajjik'aṅgaṃ, yathāsanthatik'aṅgaṃ, idaṃ vuccati vataṃ, na sīlaṃ.
23586.commentary: (NIDD1a) khalupacchābhattik'aṅgan'ti khalū'ti paṭisedhanatthe nipāto. pavāritena satā pacchā laddhaṃ bhattaṃ pacchābhattaṃ nāma, tassa pacchābhattassa bhojanaṃ pacchābhattabhojanaṃ, tasmiṃ pacchābhattabhojane pacchābhattasaññaṃ katvā pacchābhattaṃ sīlam'assā'ti pacchābhattiko, na pacchābhattiko khalupacchābhattiko, samādānavasena paṭikkhitt'ātirittabhojanass'etaṃ nāmaṃ, tassa aṅgaṃ khalupacchābhattik'aṅgaṃ.
